# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We want this project to be a welcoming and respectful space for everyone.
All contributors, maintainers, and participants are expected to treat each other with professionalism and kindness.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful in discussions and reviews.
- Assume positive intent and give constructive feedback.
- Focus on what is best for the project and community.
- Help create an inclusive environment for people of all backgrounds and experience levels.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Trolling, insulting, or derogatory comments.
- Publishing private information without permission.
- Any conduct that is inappropriate in a professional setting.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing this Code of Conduct.
They may remove, edit, or reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, and other contributions that violate this policy.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, report it to the maintainers by opening a private security report or contacting repository maintainers directly.
All reports will be reviewed and handled promptly and fairly.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies within project spaces and in public spaces when an individual is representing the project.

## Consequences

Maintainers may take any action they consider appropriate, including warning contributors, temporary restrictions, or permanent bans from the project.
